title: Cobblemon Sauce++
description: Modpack with Cobblemon, Create, Better Combat, and some extras.
body: This is a Modpack for anyone to enjoy with friends! Cobblemon and Create add plenty of new things to do. There are other small mods to make the some parts of the game a bit simpler so you can focus more on the parts you enjoy. Better Combat and some extra weapon mods are there to spice up vanilla gameplay. All the usually suspects are included to increase performance for a smooth gameplay experience! Enjoy :3
